text.title: rag-eval-generation-metrics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for rag-eval-generation-metrics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Swapping RAGAS's default OpenAI LLM evaluator for a different LLM and comparing scores across configurations.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: RAGAS metric values are LLM-dependent. A faithfulness score of 0.85 with GPT-4o is not comparable to 0.85 with a different LLM. Always keep the same LLM evaluator within an experiment to maintain comparability.
